name: PT Buana Finance Tbk
summary: PT Buana Finance Tbk. provides investment, working capital, and multipurpose financing services in Indonesia. The company operates through Lease Financing Receivables and Consumer Financing Receivables segments. It offers financing services for various products, including heavy equipment, such as excavators, wheel loaders, tractors, and heavy trucks; generator and forklifts; printing and industrial machineries; consumer cars and commercial vehicles (trucks); vessels; Hajj/Umrah; education; tour traveling/ vacation; and others. The company also provides working capital financing, which include sale and leaseback, and factoring; multipurpose financing comprising finance lease and installment finance; and investment financing that cover financing facilities for procurement of capital goods, as well as services to individuals, business entities, or legal entities for the modernization and expansion of businesses/investment. It serves customers through its network of 33 branches in Jabodetabek, Java, Sumatra, Bali, Kalimantan, Sulawesi, and Papua. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Buana Finance Tbk. is a subsidiary of PT Sari Dasa Karsa.
